hero.title: Your Gateway to Safe and Legal Driving
hero.subtitle: Mojaz provides integrated digital services for the entire driving license lifecycle in the Kingdom. Fast, secure, and professional.

services.title: Integrated Driving Services
services.description: Access all your driving license needs in one place with a streamlined digital experience.

new_license.title: New License
new_license.description: Start your journey to become a licensed driver.

renewal.title: License Renewal
renewal.description: Renew your existing license quickly and easily.

replacement.title: Replacement
replacement.description: Request a replacement for lost or damaged licenses.

upgrade.title: Category Upgrade
upgrade.description: Upgrade your license to a new vehicle category.

international.title: International License
international.description: Apply for an international driving permit.

agricultural.title: Agricultural Vehicles
agricultural.description: Special licenses for agricultural and heavy machinery.

probationary.title: Probationary License
probationary.description: Manage paths for new and young drivers.

learner.title: Learner Permit
learner.description: Apply for a permit to begin driving practice.

registration.title: Digital Registration
registration.description: Submit your application through the portal.

medical.title: Medical Examination
medical.description: Complete fitness tests at approved centers.

practical.title: Practical Test
practical.description: Demonstrate your skills on the road.

issuance.title: License Issuance
issuance.description: Receive your digital and physical license.

q1.q: How can I apply for a new driving license?
q1.a: You can start by clicking 'Start Now' on the hero section and following the registration wizard.

q2.q: What documents are required for renewal?
q2.a: Usually, only a valid national ID and a recent medical report from an approved center are required.

features.title: Advanced Technologies
features.subtitle: A service that meets your aspirations

cloud.title: Cloud Sync
cloud.description: Your data is always synced across all your devices and government servers.

wallet.title: Digital Wallet
wallet.description: Carry your license on your phone with full legal validity through the app.

notifications.title: Smart Notifications
notifications.description: Stay informed about expiry, renewals, and upcoming tests in real-time.

security.title: Nafath Integration
security.description: Secure login using the national single sign-on for maximum data protection.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Journey?
cta.subtitle: Join more than 4 million citizens and residents getting their licenses through Mojaz.
